ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  "starts" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "ends" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the campaign creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of campaign creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of campaign updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_sets" (
  "ad_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad set */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the ad set belongs to */,
  "ad_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the ad set */,
  "targeting" TEXT /* Targeting options for the ad set (e.g., demographics, interests, behaviors) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the ad set */,
  "bidding_strategy" TEXT /* Bidding strategy for the ad set (e.g., CPC, CPM, CPA) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the ad set */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the ad set */,
  "daily_budget" REAL /* Daily budget allocated to the ad set */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the ad set */,
  "bidding_strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of bidding strategy (e.g., CPC, CPM, CPA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_sets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_creatives" (
  "ad_creative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad creative */,
  "ad_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad set the ad creative belongs to */,
  "media_asset" TEXT /* Media asset used in the ad creative (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_asset_url" TEXT /* URL of the media asset */,
  "preview_url" TEXT /* Preview URL of the ad creative */,
  "messaging" TEXT /* Messaging used in the ad creative */,
  "call_to_action" TEXT /* Call-to-action used in the ad creative */,
  "creative_type" TEXT /* Type of ad creative (e.g., image, video, carousel) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the ad creative creator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of ad creative creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of ad creative updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_creative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_creatives_ad_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_set_id") REFERENCES ad_sets ("ad_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targeting_options" (
  "targeting_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each targeting option */,
  "ad_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad set the targeting option belongs to */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of targeting option (e.g., demographics, interests, behaviors) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the targeting option (e.g., female, 25-44, fashion) */,
  "targeting_option_group" TEXT /* Group of targeting options (e.g., demographics, interests, behaviors) */,
  "targeting_option_value_type" TEXT /* Type of targeting option value (e.g., exact, broad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("targeting_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targeting_options_ad_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_set_id") REFERENCES ad_sets ("ad_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_performance" (
  "ad_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ad performance entry */,
  "ad_creative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad creative the performance data belongs to */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the ad creative */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Impressions of the ad creative */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the ad creative */,
  "results" INTEGER /* Results of the ad creative (e.g., link clicks, conversions) */,
  "impressions_by_platform" TEXT /* Impressions by platform (e.g., Facebook, Instagram, Twitter) */,
  "reach_by_platform" TEXT /* Reach by platform */,
  "frequency_by_platform" TEXT /* Frequency by platform */,
  "results_by_platform" TEXT /* Results by platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_performance_ad_creative_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_creative_id") REFERENCES ad_creatives ("ad_creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "ad_creative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ad creative the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., link clicks, conversions) */,
  "result_value" INTEGER /* Value of the result */,
  "result_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the result type (e.g., conversion, link click) */,
  "result_value_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the result value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_ad_creative_id FOREIGN KEY ("ad_creative_id") REFERENCES ad_creatives ("ad_creative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., campaign manager, analyst, client) */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Facebook, Instagram, Twitter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)
